roi_calculation: Manual execution (115 tests * 8 mins) = 15.3 hours/run. Weekly regression costs 61.2 hours/month. Automation pays off in ~1.1 months.
infrastructure_setup: CI Pipeline integration (GitHub Actions), Stripe Sandbox Env configuration
success_metrics: 100% pass rate on Smoke Suite; Payout Saga happy path < 5s; Login flows < 2s
risk_factors: Stripe API rate limits during parallel testing; Flakiness in MFA UI tests
mitigation_strategies: Mock Stripe responses for logic tests; Use programmatic login (API) to bypass UI MFA for backend tests
business_value: Protects revenue generation (Payouts) and system access (Auth). Prevents critical financial data corruption.

roi_calculation: Manual execution (93 tests * 12 mins - high complexity) = 18.6 hours/run. Automation pays off in ~3 months due to complexity.
infrastructure_setup: Dedicated GPU instances for staging (if local LLM) or OpenAI Sandbox keys; AWS Comprehend mock
success_metrics: SOW Extraction schema validity > 99%; PII Redaction verification automated
risk_factors: AI hallucinations causing test false positives; External OpenAI API latency/costs
mitigation_strategies: Implement 'fuzzy' matching for AI text assertions; Use recorded API responses (VCR pattern) for regression
business_value: Ensures core value proposition (AI automation) works reliably and remains GDPR compliant (PII redaction).

roi_calculation: Replaces expensive external security audits for every minor release. Prevents regression of API latency NFRs.
infrastructure_setup: Load injection nodes (EC2); Dedicated Perf env with prod-parity RDS
success_metrics: API p95 < 250ms verified; Zero High/Critical vulnerabilities in automated scan
risk_factors: Performance tests affecting shared staging resources; False positives in security scans
mitigation_strategies: Schedule perf tests off-hours; Baseline tuning for ZAP scans to reduce noise
business_value: Enforces SOC 2 compliance (Security) and user experience standards (Performance) automatically.

roi_calculation: Manual execution (80 tests * 10 mins) = 13.3 hours/run. Automation pays off in ~3.5 months.
infrastructure_setup: Fault injection framework for Saga rollback testing
success_metrics: Saga rollback reliability 100%; Webhook reconciliation logic verified
risk_factors: Complex state setup for edge cases (e.g., specific Stripe error codes)
mitigation_strategies: Database seeding scripts for specific failure states; Dependency injection for error simulation
business_value: Reduces support costs by preventing complex edge-case bugs in financial and matching logic.

roi_calculation: Low direct ROI on execution frequency, but High ROI on disaster prevention (Infra drift).
success_metrics: Infra changes validated pre-merge; Dependency updates automated
risk_factors: Long execution times for infra provisioning tests
mitigation_strategies: Run full infra suite only on changes to /terraform directory; Use plan analysis for quick feedback
business_value: Ensures environment stability and recoverability (Disaster Recovery).
